source_rationale: The path more commonly found from the boolean simulations connects MP2K, with Th17 cells, the retinal nerve fiber layer (RNFL) thickness and the age related MS severity score (ARMSS).
MP2K1 - STAT6 > Th17 > mRNFL > T25WT - ARMSS
MP2K1 - STAT6 > Th17 > mRNFL > T25WT - ARMSS
MP2K1 > CD8 Treg > GCIPL > EDSS Change
LCK - JUN > Th1 non-Classic > NGMV - mRNFL - T2LV
LCK - JUN > Th1 non-Classic > NGMV - mRNFL - T2LV
MK03 > Total T Cells > mRNFL > T25WT
HSPB1 > B Memory > NBV > MSSS - T25WT
HSPB1- MP2K1 > CD8 Treg - B Memory > GCIPL > ARMSS - EDSS Change
HSPB1- MP2K1 > CD8 Treg - B Memory > GCIPL > ARMSS - EDSS Change
STAT6 > Th17 > mRNFL - INL > ARMSS
MP2K1 > Th17 - CD8 Treg > mRNFL - INL > ARMSS - EDSS Change - 9HPT Change
MP2K1 > Th17 - CD8 Treg > mRNFL - INL > ARMSS - EDSS Change - 9HPT Change
KS6B1 - LCK > Total T Cells - Th1 Non Classic > NGMV - T2LV > LCVA Change - MSSS - Years since Relapse
KS6B1 - LCK > Total T Cells - Th1 Non Classic > NGMV - T2LV > LCVA Change - MSSS - Years since Relapse
KS6B1 - LCK > Total T Cells - Th1 Non Classic > NGMV - T2LV > LCVA Change - MSSS - Years since Relapse
KS6B1 - LCK > Total T Cells - Th1 Non Classic > NGMV - T2LV > LCVA Change - MSSS - Years since Relapse
